title: Territory (canonical entity file)
description: One file per national geographic subdivision, across all eras: data/territories/<slug>.json. Covers the 16 National Service Territories (2021-), the four regions (1992-2021), earlier region schemes, and areas within regions — distinguished by division_type on each version. All share the 'territory:' ref namespace. The 2021 regions->NST reorganization is modeled as 'reorganized' events in data/territories/_events.json.

division_type.description: What kind of subdivision this was during this window.

number.description: Official number where the scheme is numbered (NSTs, numbered areas).

parent.description: Containing subdivision during this window (an area's region). Null for top-level divisions.
